0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-chevron-down text-tertiary" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"></path></svg></button></div></div></div><p>The 835 Electronic Remittance Advice (ERA) contains details about payments for specific services and explanations for any adjustments or denials. This endpoint retrieves processed 835 ERA transactions from Stedi.</p>
<ol>
<li>Call this endpoint with the <code>transactionId</code> of the 835 ERA you want to retrieve. You can retrieve the transaction ID through webhooks or through Stedi&#x27;s API. <a href="/docs/healthcare/receive-claim-responses#discover-processed-responses">Learn more</a></li>
<li>The endpoint returns the 835 ERA in JSON format.</li>
</ol>
<p>Note that the payer won&#x27;t send 835 ERAs for rejected claims. If a claim is rejected in a 277CA claim acknowledgment, there&#x27;s no adjudication or payment information to report.</p>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="claim-status"><a data-card="" href="#claim-status" class="peer">Claim status</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<p>You can&#x27;t reliably determine a claim&#x27;s status based on the amount paid in an 835 ERA. There are many instances in which a claim is accepted and the total amount paid is 0 dollars. For example, in Value-Based Care (VBC) scenarios, line item rates are usually 0 dollars, and providers are paid a flat rate per month or for a complete bundle of services.</p>
<p>Use the <a href="/docs/healthcare/api-reference/post-healthcare-claim-status">Real-Time Claim Status API</a> to check the claim&#x27;s status instead.</p><div class="flex items-end justify-between leading-[24px]"><p>A unique identifier for the processed 835 transaction within Stedi. This ID is included in the transaction processed event, which you can receive automatically through Stedi <a href="https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/configure-webhooks" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">webhooks</a>. You can also retrieve it through the <a href="https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/api-reference/get-poll-transactions" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Poll Transactions endpoint</a> or from the transaction&#x27;s details page within the Stedi portal.</p></div></div></div><nav class="api-section-nav"><div class="flex gap-4 items-center"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" 9H17V11H3V9Z"></path></svg>String</span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The telephone number including the area code (if applicable). Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, <code>5551123345</code> for <code>555-112-3345</code>.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none break-words">transactions[].detailInfo[].paymentInfo[].serviceLines[].servicePaymentInformation.lineItemProviderPaymentAmount</div><div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1 mt-3"><span class="px-2.5 py-1 rounded-md font-[500] text-[13px] bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/50 text-blue-700 dark:text-blue-300 break-all whitespace-normal inline-flex items-center gap-1"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="currentColor" class="remixicon size-3.5"><path d="M3 4H21V6H3V4ZM3 19H17V21H3V19ZM3 14H21V16H3V14ZM3 9H17V11H3V9Z"></path></svg>String</span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The amount paid for the service, expressed as a decimal.</p>
<p>This amount is calculated as follows:</p>
<p><code>servicePaymentInformation.lineItemProviderPaymentAmount =   servicePaymentInformation.lineItemChargeAmount - (sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount1) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount2) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount3) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount4) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount5) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount6))</code></p>
<p>All properties in the formula are within a single <code>transactions[].detailInfo[].paymentInfo[].serviceLines</code> array entry. Note that <code>serviceAdjustments</code> is an object array that could contain up to 99 entries, each with up to 6 adjustment amounts in separate properties. This allows for up to 594 total adjustments.</p>
<p>Adjustments can be either positive or negative. When the adjustment amounts are positive, the payment decreases. When the adjustment amounts are negative, the payment amount increases, and will be larger than the <code>lineItemChargeAmount</code>.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none last:border-b overflow-visible [role=tabpanel]_&amp;:!border-none [role=tabpanel]_&amp;:!p-0 [role=tabpanel]_&amp;:!rounded-none <code>adjudicatedProcedureCode</code>.</p><div><section class="rounded-md border bg-fd-card"><div class="flex flex-wrap justify-between p-3 border-t border-b first:border-t-0 last:rounded-b-md first:rounded-t-md"><div aria-level="1" class="text-sm text-fd-primary font-medium" role="heading">Possible values</div><button class="text-sm text-fd-primary/60 hover:text-fd-primary/80 class="font-mono">^\d{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12]\d|3[01])$</code></span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The date the payer considers the transaction to be settled. If the payment is made by automated clearinghouse (ACH), this is the date the funds are available to the provider. If the payment is made by check, this is the date the check is issued. If the payment is made by Federal Reserve Funds/wire transfer, this is the date that the payer anticipates the money to move.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 payment is a credit or debit. Can be set to <code>C</code> - Credit or <code>D</code> - Debit. Visit <a href="https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#credit-or-debit-flag-code" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">ERA code lists</a> for usage notes.</p><div><section pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The telephone number including the area code (if applicable). Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, <code>5551123345</code> for <code>555-112-3345</code>.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The contact telephone number including the area code. Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, <code>5551123345</code> for <code>555-112-3345</code>.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none style="background-color:#0A0A0A;color:#D4D4D4" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">{</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;meta&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;applicationMode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;production&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;senderId&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;BSW&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;transactionId&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;7647d644-9348-4596-a3b4-6830b8b48cc8&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">  },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;transactions&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">    {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;controlNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;112233&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;detailInfo&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">        {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">          &quot;assignedNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">          &quot;paymentInfo&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">            {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;claimPaymentInfo&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;claimFilingIndicatorCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;12&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;claimFrequencyCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;claimPaymentAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;500&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;claimStatusCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;facilityTypeCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;11&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;patientControlNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1112223333&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;patientResponsibilityAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;300&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;payerClaimControlNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;94060555410000&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;totalClaimChargeAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;800&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">              },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;claimSupplementalInformation&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;coverageAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;800&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">              },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;patientName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;firstName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;JOHN&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;lastName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;DOE&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                &quot;memberId&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1234567891&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">              },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;serviceLines&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                  &quot;lineItemControlNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;111222333&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                  &quot;serviceAdjustments&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                    {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                      &quot;adjustmentAmount1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;300&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                      &quot;adjustmentReason1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Deductible Amount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                      &quot;adjustmentReasonCode1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                      &quot;claimAdjustmentGroupCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;PR&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                      &quot;claimAdjustmentGroupCodeValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Patient Responsibility&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                  ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                  &quot;serviceDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20190301&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                  &quot;servicePaymentInformation&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;adjudicatedProcedureCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;99211&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;lineItemChargeAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;800&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;lineItemProviderPaymentAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;500&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;productOrServiceIDQualifier&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;HC&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;productOrServiceIDQualifierValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Health Care Financing Administration Common Procedural Coding System (HCPCS) Codes&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                  },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                  &quot;serviceSupplementalAmounts&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">                    &quot;allowedActual&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;800&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">                }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">              ]</span></span>

decimal. \n\n This amount is calculated as follows: \n\n`servicePaymentInformation.lineItemProviderPaymentAmount =\n  servicePaymentInformation.lineItemChargeAmount - (sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount1) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount2) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount3) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount4) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount5) + sum(serviceAdjustments[].adjustmentAmount6))`\n\nAll properties in the formula are within a single `transactions[].detailInfo[].paymentInfo[].serviceLines` array entry. Note that `serviceAdjustments` is an object array that could contain up to 99 entries, each with up to 6 adjustment amounts in separate properties. This allows for up to 594 total adjustments.\n\nAdjustments can be either positive or negative. When the adjustment amounts are positive, the payment decreases. When the adjustment amounts are negative, the payment amount increases, and will be larger than the `lineItemChargeAmount`."])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"5d:[\"$\",\"$L4e\",\"application/json\",{\"value\":\"application/json\",\"children\":[null,[\"$\",\"div\",null,{\"className\":\"my-2\",\"children\":[[[\"$\",\"$1\",\"meta\",{\"children\":[\"$\",\"$L4f\",null,{\"constraints\":{\"default\":\"$undefined\",\"pattern\":\"$undefined\",\"format\":\"$undefined\",\"multipleOf\":\"$undefined\",\"minimum\":\"$undefined\",\"exclusiveMinimum\":\"$undefined\",\"maximum\":\"$undefined\",\"exclusiveMaximum\":\"$undefined\",\"minLength\":\"$undefined\",\"maxLength\":\"$undefined\",\"minProperties\":\"$undefined\",\"maxProperties\":\"$undefined\",\"minItems\":\"$undefined\",\"maxItems\":\"$undefined\"},\"deprecated\":\"$undefined\",\"name\":\"meta\",\"namespace\":\"response\",\"schema\":{\"description\":\"Metadata that helps Stedi track and debug the response.\",\"properties\":{\"applicationMode\":{\"description\":\"Whether this is a test or production ERA.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"senderId\":{\"description\":\"An identifier for the most recent sender of the ERA. Visit [ERA code lists](https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#claim-adjustment-group-code) for a complete list and usage notes.\",\"enum\":[\"CO\",\"OA\",\"PI\",\"PR\"],\"type\":\"string\"},\"claimAdjustmentGroupCodeValue\":{\"description\":\"The description of the `claimAdjustmentGroupCode`.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"type\":\"array\"},\"claimContactInformation\":{\"description\":\"Contact information for claim-related communications.\",\"items\":{\"properties\":{\"contactMethods\":{\"items\":{\"properties\":{\"email\":{\"description\":\"The email address.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"fax\":{\"description\":\"The fax number.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"phone\":{\"description\":\"The telephone number including the area code (if applicable). Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, `5551123345` for `555-112-3345`.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"phoneExtension\":{\"description\":\"The telephone extension, if applicable.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"type\":\"array\"},\"contactName\":{\"description\":\"The name of the contact person or entity.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"type\":\"array\"},\"claimPaymentInfo\":{\"description\":\"Basic claim payment information including amounts and status.\",\"properties\":{\"claimFilingIndicatorCode\":{\"description\":\"A code identifying the type of claim. For example `DS` - Disability. Visit [ERA code lists](https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#claim-filing-indicator-code) for a complete list and usage notes.\",\"enum\":[\"12\",\"13\",\"14\",\"15\",\"16\",\"17\",\"AM\",\"CH\",\"DS\",\"HM\",\"LI\",\"LM\",\"MA\",\"MB\",\"MC\",\"OF\",\"TV\",\"VA\",\"WC\",\"ZZ\"],\"type\":\"string\"},\"claimFrequencyCode\":{\"description\":\"A code identifying the frequency of the claim. It matches what the payer received in the original claim. Visit [Bill Type Frequency Codes](https://www.nubc.org/system/files/media/file/2019/06/billTypeFrequencyCodes837.pdf) for a complete list and definitions.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"claimPaymentAmount\":{\"description\":\"The total amount of the claim payment, expressed as a decimal. This value can be positive, zero, or negative.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"claimStatusCode\":{\"description\":\"The status of the claim. For example, `1` - Processed as Primary. Visit [ERA code lists](https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/claims-code-lists#claim-status-code) for a complete list and usage notes.\",\"enum\":[\"1\",\"2\",\"3\",\"4\",\"19\",\"20\",\"21\",\"22\",\"23\",\"25\"],\"type\":\"string\"},\"diagnosisRelatedGroupDRGCode\":{\"description\":\"Code indicating a patient's diagnosis group based on their medical symptoms.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"diagnosisRelatedGroupDRGWeight\":{\"description\":\"The adjudicated diagnosis-related group (DRG) weight.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"dischargeFraction\":{\"description\":\"The adjudicated discharge fraction.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"facilityTypeCode\":{\"description\":\"A code identifying where services were or may be performed. This is the [Place of Service Codes](https://www.cms.gov/medicare/coding-billing/place-of-service-codes/code-sets) for Professional or Dental Services.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"patientControlNumber\":{\"description\":\"The patient control number provided in the original claim. You can use this value to correlate the payer's response with the original claim.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"patientResponsibilityAmount\":{\"description\":\"The amount the patient is responsible for paying. This can include the deductible, non-covered services, co-pay, and co-insurance. This is not used for reversals.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"payerClaimControlNumber\":{\"description\":\"The payer's internal control number for the claim.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"totalClaimChargeAmount\":{\"description\":\"The total amount of submitted charges for this claim, expressed as a decimal. This can be positive, zero, or negative. For example, this may contain a negative charge for a reversal claim.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"claimReceivedDate\":{\"description\":\"The date the claim was received by the payer.\",\"pattern\":\"^\\\\d{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12]\\\\d|3[01])$\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"claimStatementPeriodEnd\":{\"description\":\"The claim period end date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). For Blue Cross and Blue Shield Plans, this is the Blue Cross Blue Shield association plan code.\\n\\nProviders rarely use this identifier in practice.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"payerWebSiteUrl\":{\"description\":\"The payer's web address. The URL is typically provided without the scheme and separator. For example, `stedi.com`.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"submitterIdentificationNumber\":{\"description\":\"An identifier for the payer. This is used when the original transaction sender is not the payer or has an identifier other than those already provided.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"technicalContactInformation\":{\"description\":\"A person or office.\",\"items\":{\"description\":\"Technical contact information for the payer.\",\"properties\":{\"contactMethods\":{\"description\":\"Available contact methods for technical support.\",\"items\":{\"description\":\"Contact method details for technical support.\",\"properties\":{\"email\":{\"description\":\"The contact email address.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"fax\":{\"description\":\"The contact fax number.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"phone\":{\"description\":\"The contact telephone number including the area code. Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, `5551123345` for `555-112-3345`.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"phoneExtension\":{\"description\":\"The contact telephone extension, if applicable.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"url\":{\"description\":\"A web address to contact the person or entity. The URL is typically provided without the scheme and separator. For example, `stedi.com`.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"type\":\"array\"},\"contactName\":{\"description\":\"The name of the contact person or entity.\",\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"type\":\"array\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"paymentAndRemitReassociationDetails\":{\"description\":\"Payment and remittance reassociation details for transaction tracking.\",\"properties\":{\"checkOrEFTTraceNumber\":{\"description\":\"This value uniquely identifies the transaction. This is either the check number, the EFT reference number, or a unique remittance advice identification number (for non-payment ERAs).\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"originatingCompanyIdentifier\":{\"description\":\"A unique identifier for the payer. This is a 1 followed by the payer's Employer Identification Number (EIN) or Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN).\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"originatingCompanySupplementalCode\":{\"description\":\"A value that identifies a further subdivision within the payer's organization.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"traceTypeCode\":{\"description\":\"Code that identifies which transaction is being referenced. This can be set to `1` - Current Transaction Trace Numbers.\",\"enum\":[\"1\"],\"type\":\"string\"}},\"type\":\"object\"},\"productionDate\":{\"description\":\"The end date for the adjudication production cycle for claims included in this ERA.\",\"pattern\":\"^\\\\d{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12]\\\\d|3[01])$\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"providerAdjustments\":{\"description\":\"Provider-level adjustment information for debit or credit transactions such as: accelerated payments, cost report settlements for a fiscal year, and timeliness report penalties unrelated to a specific claim or service. These adjustments can either decrease the payment (a positive number) or increase the payment (a negative number).\",\"items\":{\"description\":\"Provider-level adjustments unrelated to specific claims.\",\"properties\":{\"adjustments\":{\"description\":\"List of adjustments applied to the provider.\",\"items\":{\"description\":\"Provider adjustment details including reason codes and amounts.\",\"properties\":{\"adjustmentReasonCode\":{\"description\":\"A code identifying the reason for the adjustment. This is typically included when the receiver of the transaction is not the payee, such as a clearinghouse or billing service.\",\"type\":\"string\"},\"versionIdentification\":{\"description\":\"The version number of the adjudication system that generated the claim
